choices.text: Patched conics: series of 2-body problems patched at sphere-of-influence boundaries. Earth-departure, heliocentric coast, arrival each 2-body. JPL technique. Refine with full propagation.
Every 26 months when Earth-Mars alignment allows Hohmann transfer. Miss → wait 2+ years. Multi-year mission prep timed to specific window. Voyager grand tour used 175-year planetary alignment.

Safe mode (low power, ground contact, stable attitude) + telemetry analysis + simulator reproduction + recovery plan. Famous: Galileo HGA stuck (LGA workaround); Hubble mirror (corrective optics); Voyager fixed from 24B km.

Launched 1977; still operating 47+ years. Voyager 1 entered interstellar space 2012; 24B+ km from Earth. RTG-powered. Visited Jupiter + Saturn + Uranus + Neptune via grand tour. Carries Golden Record.

NASA + commercial both viable. NASA civil service stable lower pay; SpaceX/Blue Origin fast-paced; new space startups high-risk. BS aerospace + internship + MS + portfolio + AIAA networking. Skills: CAD, embedded, Python/C++, ML for autonomy. Hot areas: reusable launch, lunar, Mars, satellites.
